  launch-ui, launch        (Default Verb) Launch UI.

  list, l                  List all licenses.

  activate, a              Activate the specified serial key.

  deactivate, d            Deactivate the specified serial key.

  refresh, r               Refresh the specified serial key.

  import, i                Import the offline license file at the specified
                           path.

  local-activate, local    Activate license from the local package.

  log                      Enable or disable the runtime log.

  help                     Display more information on a specific command.

  version                  Display version information.
